# Custom control words described through one declarative syntax/effect block.

DUP ( X[1] -- X[1] X[1] )
2DROP ( X[2] X[1] -- )
0= ( n -- flag )
: parse word define colon ( -- )
; control end ( -- )
literal integer ( -- n )
WHEN control when ( flag -- )
OTHERWISE control otherwise ( -- )
ENDWHEN control endwhen ( -- )

syntax:
  WHEN <branch>
  [OTHERWISE <fallback branch>]
  ENDWHEN
  effect:
    WHEN
    either <branch> <fallback branch>
